nasb.text: For “the name of God is blasphemed among the Gentiles because of you,” just as it is written.

esv.text: For, as it is written, “The name of God is blasphemed among the Gentiles because of you.”

cnv.text: 正如經上所說的：“　神的名，因你們的緣故在列邦中被褻瀆。”

ccb.text: 正如圣经上说：“因你们的缘故，上帝的名在外族人中受到亵渎！”

csbs.text: 事实上，正如经上所记：“因你们的缘故，神的名在外邦人中受到亵渎。”
